news.title:
Brainbees Solutions' subsidiary Globalbees has increased its stake in Candes Technology to 92%.
The acquisition was executed via cash consideration of INR 37,250, raising Globalbees' stake by 30%.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions' subsidiary Globalbees has increased its stake in Candes Technology to 92%.
The acquisition was executed via cash consideration of INR 37,250, raising Globalbees' stake by 30%.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd updates on Swara Baby's wholly owned subsidiary in USA.
Initial subscription timeline extended to April 30, 2026 due to procedural delay.
news.summary:

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions reports Q3 FY25 consolidated revenue of ₹24,236M and loss of ₹384M.
Board changes include a Non-Exec Director replacement; IPO utilization details submitted.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions reports Q3 FY25 consolidated revenue of ₹24,236M and loss of ₹384M.
Board changes include a Non-Exec Director replacement; IPO utilization details submitted.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions participated in 'Chasing Growth 2026' by Kotak Institutional Equities.
The meet on Feb 25, 2026, in Mumbai involved one-on-one and group interactions.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions participated in 'Chasing Growth 2026' by Kotak Institutional Equities.
The meet on Feb 25, 2026, in Mumbai involved one-on-one and group interactions.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions posted PAT positive for Q3 FY26, excluding ESOP costs. Adjusted nine-month EBITDA rose 25% YoY.
India multichannel grew sequentially; international business cut adjusted EBITDA losses by 25% YoY. Globalbees grew 30% YoY.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions posted PAT positive for Q3 FY26, excluding ESOP costs. Adjusted nine-month EBITDA rose 25% YoY.
India multichannel grew sequentially; international business cut adjusted EBITDA losses by 25% YoY. Globalbees grew 30% YoY.

news.title:
FirstCry's Q3 net loss widened to Rs 38 crore from Rs 14.7 crore YoY.
Revenue rose 11.6% as expenses increased from expanding rapid delivery services.
news.summary:
FirstCry's Q3 net loss widened to Rs 38 crore from Rs 14.7 crore YoY.
Revenue rose 11.6% as expenses increased from expanding rapid delivery services.

news.title:
BrainBees Solutions posts Q3 EBITDA of 970M, down from 1B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin drops to 4% from 4.9% YoY for BrainBees Solutions.
news.summary:
BrainBees Solutions posts Q3 EBITDA of 970M, down from 1B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin drops to 4% from 4.9% YoY for BrainBees Solutions.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions shows YoY growth, positive PAT, and free cash flow in 9M FY26.
Globalbees reports 30% YoY growth, positive PAT, and INR 698 Mn EBITDA in 9M FY26.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions shows YoY growth, positive PAT, and free cash flow in 9M FY26.
Globalbees reports 30% YoY growth, positive PAT, and INR 698 Mn EBITDA in 9M FY26.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd schedules an earnings call on Feb 13, 2026, at 6 PM IST to discuss Q3 and nine-month results of FY26.
The call includes a management discussion, Q&A, and recording, with details available on the company's investor relations site.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd schedules an earnings call on Feb 13, 2026, at 6 PM IST to discuss Q3 and nine-month results of FY26.
The call includes a management discussion, Q&A, and recording, with details available on the company's investor relations site.

news.title:
India's startups are opting for early IPOs due to tighter private funding, better governance, and mature public markets.
Listings like Ola Electric, MobiKwik, and FirstCry highlight shifts to sustainability, profitability, and public market alignment.
news.summary:
India's startups are opting for early IPOs due to tighter private funding, better governance, and mature public markets.
Listings like Ola Electric, MobiKwik, and FirstCry highlight shifts to sustainability, profitability, and public market alignment.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd received a tax demand of Rs. 31.4 crore for AY 2022-23.
The company plans to appeal against ESOP expense disallowance and transfer pricing adjustments.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd received a tax demand of Rs. 31.4 crore for AY 2022-23.
The company plans to appeal against ESOP expense disallowance and transfer pricing adjustments.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions faces Rs. 65.7 cr demand for duty exemption violation under APTA.
The company plans a legal appeal, citing a strong case on merits.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions faces Rs. 65.7 cr demand for duty exemption violation under APTA.
The company plans a legal appeal, citing a strong case on merits.

news.title:
JM Financial forecasts strong Q3FY26 for Paytm, Delhivery, Nykaa, and Eternal, with Buy ratings and target prices of Rs 1,810, Rs 570, Rs 325, and Rs 400, respectively.
Weaker performance expected for Swiggy and Nazara; Swiggy faces monetisation challenges, Nazara hit by seasonality and regulatory issues. Target prices: Rs 400, Rs 280.
news.summary:
JM Financial forecasts strong Q3FY26 for Paytm, Delhivery, Nykaa, and Eternal, with Buy ratings and target prices of Rs 1,810, Rs 570, Rs 325, and Rs 400, respectively.
Weaker performance expected for Swiggy and Nazara; Swiggy faces monetisation challenges, Nazara hit by seasonality and regulatory issues. Target prices: Rs 400, Rs 280.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd increased its stake in Swara Baby to 76.59%.
Solis Hygiene is now a wholly owned subsidiary of Swara Baby.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd increased its stake in Swara Baby to 76.59%.
Solis Hygiene is now a wholly owned subsidiary of Swara Baby.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd's subsidiary, Swara Baby, acquires 100% stake in KA Hygiene for INR 57.7 Cr.
KA Hygiene, specializing in hygiene products, becomes a step-down subsidiary with 2024-25 turnover of INR 84 Cr.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions Ltd's subsidiary, Swara Baby, acquires 100% stake in KA Hygiene for INR 57.7 Cr.
KA Hygiene, specializing in hygiene products, becomes a step-down subsidiary with 2024-25 turnover of INR 84 Cr.

news.title:
Brainbees Solutions' subsidiary Swara Baby Products incorporated Swara Corp. in the USA.
Swara Corp. will trade diapers and hygiene products with $10,000 cash invested for shares.
news.summary:
Brainbees Solutions' subsidiary Swara Baby Products incorporated Swara Corp. in the USA.

news.title:

Target price has been reduced to Rs 365 from Rs 417.
news.summary:

The acquisition involved a 6.5% stake purchase worth INR 2.4 Crores.
